hooks.command: node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on('data',d=>chunks.push(d)); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const input=JSON.parse(Buffer.concat(chunks).toString()); const cmd=input.tool_input?.command||''; const isPush=cmd.includes('git push'); const isMain=/git push.*\bmain\b/.test(cmd)||/git push.*\bmaster\b/.test(cmd); if(!isPush){process.exit(0);} const msg=isMain?'BLOCKED: Never push directly to main. Create a feature/ branch and open a PR.':'REMINDER: Make sure you are on a feature/ branch, not main.'; const decision=isMain?'block':'allow'; console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',permissionDecision:decision,permissionDecisionReason:msg},systemMessage:msg})); process.exit(isMain?1:0); });"

node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on('data',d=>chunks.push(d)); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const input=JSON.parse(Buffer.concat(chunks).toString()); const fp=(input.tool_input?.file_path||'').replace(/\\\\/g,'/'); const GATED=['/src/actions/','/src/app/','/src/components/','/prisma/']; const isGated=GATED.some(p=>fp.includes(p)); const isSpec=fp.includes('/src/specs/'); if(!isGated||isSpec){process.exit(0);} const msg='SPEC-DRIVEN REMINDER: Estas creando un archivo en una zona de codigo ('+fp+'). Asegurate de tener una spec aprobada en src/specs/ antes de continuar.'; console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:msg},systemMessage:msg})); process.exit(0); });"

hooks.statusMessage: Checking file type for lint reminder...
hooks.command: node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on('data',d=>chunks.push(d)); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const input=JSON.parse(Buffer.concat(chunks).toString()); const fp=input.tool_input?.file_path||input.tool_response?.filePath||''; if(!fp.match(/\.(ts|tsx)$/)){process.exit(0);} const msg='Lint check: run \"npm run lint\" and \"npx tsc --noEmit\" before committing.'; console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:msg},systemMessage:msg})); process.exit(0); });"
